radishes-with-dukkah.name: Radishes With Dukkah
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Place pistachios and pine nuts on a rimmed baking sheet and toast for 5 minutes. Add sesame seeds, coriander seeds, and cumin seeds and toast until nuts are golden brown and spices are fragrant, about 5 minutes. Let cool. Coarsely grind in a blender or food processor with salt and pepper. Serve breakfast radishes with olive oil and dukkah for dipping.

raspberry-radler.name: Raspberry Radler

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
-oz. cans light lager or wheat beer

instructions: Cook 12 oz. fresh or frozen raspberries, ¾ cup (150 g) sugar, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2 Tbsp. water in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until berries start to soften and fall apart and sugar is completely dissolved, 6–8 minutes (frozen raspberries will take about 2 minutes longer).

Remove pan from heat and smash berries with a potato masher or fork. Add ¾ cup fresh lemon juice (from about 5 lemons) and ½ cup Campari. Transfer raspberry mixture to an airtight container (you should have about 2¾ cups), cover, and chill until cold, at least 1 hour and up to 2 days.

To serve, place ⅓ cup raspberry mixture (stir well to redistribute seeds and pulp first) in each of 8 tall glasses filled with ice. Top each with 6 oz. light lager or wheat beer and stir lightly to combine. Garnish each one with a lemon slice.

raspberry-yogurt-dessert-lezzet.name: Raspberry Yogurt Dessert
instructions: 1. Rub yogurt, cream, sweetener and vanilla in a bowl.
2. Take a few of the frambuases and make the rest in the kitchen robot purely.
3. Add and mix the mashed porridge into the mixture of yogurt and share it to the serving bowls.
4. Decorate over the frambuases you're hungry and cool in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
5. Serve.
6.  Afiyet olsun.
7. You can get here to the recipe of yogurt prepared with Blackberry.

raspberry-ricotta-cake-with-white-chocol.name: Raspberry-ricotta Cake With White Chocolate And Almonds
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg.

Cream sugar and butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy, 3 to 5 minutes. Beat in eggs, 1 at a time, mixing well after each addition. Add ricotta cheese, vanilla, and almond extract and beat until thoroughly incorporated, 2 to 3 minutes. Pour in 1/2 of the dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Repeat with remaining dry ingredients.
Measure out 1/4 cup raspberries and 2 tablespoons sliced almonds; set aside.

Add remaining raspberries and almonds to the batter, along with white chocolate chips; gently fold to combine. Pour batter into the prepared pan and smooth into an even layer. Sprinkle reserved raspberries and almonds evenly over top, followed by turbinado sugar.

Place the pan on top of a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out with a few moist crumbs, 85 to 90 minutes. Allow cake to cool in the pan for 30 minutes, then gently run a table knife around the edges to loosen, and remove sides. Let cool completely before serving.

raw-and-crispy-kale-salad-with-ginger-an.name: Raw And Crispy Kale Salad With Ginger And Coconut

ingredients.item: . plus  0.5 cup grapeseed or vegetable oil
Red or green thai or serrano 	chile
Cilantro leaves with tender stems or mint leaves

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Divide half of kale between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets. Drizzle each with 1 Tbsp. grapeseed oil, season with salt, and toss to coat. Spread out in a single layer and bake until crisp and lightly browned in spots, 8–10 minutes. Set kale chips aside.

Meanwhile, whisk lemon juice, soy sauce, tahini, honey, sesame oil, ginger, garlic, and remaining ½ cup grapeseed oil in a large bowl. Mix in shallot and chile, season dressing lightly with salt, and let sit at least 5 minutes.
Toast coconut in a dry medium skillet over medium heat, tossing once or twice, until most flakes are golden, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl.
Using a paring knife, remove peel and white pith from grapefruits. Slice however you want, working to avoid cores.

Tear remaining raw kale into bite-size pieces and add to bowl with dressing. Season with more salt and give kale a good scrunch to soften. Add grapefruit, coconut, cilantro, and reserved kale chips and gently toss to combine.

recipe-for-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-.original_name: Receta de pechugas de pollo a la plancha con batatas asadas

Warm a frying pan or plate with medium-high heat. Cooking the breasts from 5 to 6 minutes on each side, depending on the thickness, until they are golden and juicy on the outside.
Serve the breasts with roasted potatoes and come with a fresh salad or steamed vegetables if you wish for a more complete plate.

Corta la parte superior de las cebollas (como si fueran una tapa) y retira con cuidado el interior, dejando dos o tres capas externas intactas para formar una especie de cuenco. Reserva el interior.

Mientras tanto, pica finamente la pulpa de las cebollas que retiraste.
Wash the eggplant and partially pat it if you wish to smooth the taste and cut it into small cubes.
Ralla o pica muy fino los tomates.

In a frying pan, heats olive oil and pits the chopped garlic. Add onion, eggplant, tomato, salt, pepper, cumin, oregano and cinnamon. It cooks with medium heat for 15-20 minutes, stirring from time to time, till everything's well cooked and focused.

recipe-for-pork-loin-stuffed-with-spinac.original_name: Receta de lomo de cerdo relleno de espinacas y piñones
instructions: Do a cut along the pork's back without completely dividing them, opening them as a book. Hail to taste.
In a frying pan, heat up olive oil and purify onion and garlic until they are golden. Add spinach and pineapple and cook till spinach fades. Salphis to taste and add the pits cheese.
Coloca el relleno en el centro del lomo abierto y cierra enrollando la carne. Ata con hilo de cocina para mantener la forma.
In the same frying pan, add a little more olive oil and seal the back from all sides till it's golden.

recipe-for-shrimp-skewers-with-bacon-com.name: Recipe For Shrimp Skewers With Bacon
recipe-for-shrimp-skewers-with-bacon-com.original_name: Receta de brochetas de gambas con bacon
instructions: It starts by making sure that the shrimp are clear and dry. If the bacon is very wide, you can cut it lengthand to get it wrapped more easily around the shrimp.

Wrap every guba with a bacon strap. Be sure to cover the guba well, starting with his head till his tail. Bacon should completely wrap up the guba so that while cooking, its flavors are perfectly fused.
Insert pawns wrapped with bacon into clasp sticks. You can place two or three prawns per brush, depending on the size of your prawns and bacon.

Prepare your grill or frying pan with medium-high heat and brush with olive oil. Put the brocketas onto the hot grill and cook them for about 2 to 3 minutes on each side or until the Bacon's crisp and the shrimp have grown pink and opaque.
Serve the brocketas immediately after cooking them with lemon rooms so that each guest can squeeze some fresh lemon juice onto his brocketas.

recipe-for-spaghetti-with-squid-in-its-i.original_name: Receta de espaguetis con calamares en su tinta

recipe-to-make-sourdough-comedera.name: Recipe To Make Sourdough
instructions: Day 1: Mix 25 g wheat flour, 25 g rye flour and 50 ml inside the container. Just leave the cover loose and have the air run. Let them ferment at room temperature. No bubbles.
Day 2: Add to the previous mass the same amount of ingredients and let them ferment for 24 hours. Here we will start to perceive acid aromas and some bubbles will start to appear.
Day 3: Pull and pull half the dough. Add 50 g of each flour and 100 ml of water. Let them ferment for 24 hours. Here you can mark the glass bowl to see how much its volume increases.

Day 4: Retract and pull half the dough again. Add 50 g of each flour and 100 ml of water. Let them ferment for 24 hours. The smell begins to become more intense and the mass volume begins to increase.
Day 5: Pull and pull half the mass back. Add 50 g of each flour and 100 ml of water. Let them ferment for 24 hours. On this day the mass already has twice its volume or more and is ready to use.

recipe-to-prepare-an-oreo-cookie-mug-cak.name: Recipe To Prepare An Oreo Cookie Mug Cake
recipe-to-prepare-an-oreo-cookie-mug-cak.original_name: Receta para preparar un mug cake de galletas Oreo

Add cocoa, flour, baking powder and sugar and shake again
It polish two of the cookies and adds that powder to the mixture, incorporates very well with the other ingredients
Vierte tu mezcla de mug cake en una taza
Stretch the remaining two cookies and add them to the mixture
Cocina en el microondas por dos minutos
Disfruta

red-cabbage-and-onion-slaw.name: Red Cabbage And Onion Slaw
instructions: Combine cabbage and onion in a medium bowl; season generously with salt. Let sit until they start to release their water, 8–10 minutes, then begin to massage, gently at first so they don’t break, then harder as they begin to expel their liquid, until softened to about the texture of coleslaw. Pour off all excess liquid and add vinegar and oil; toss to coat. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Do Ahead: Slaw can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

red-cabbage-slaw.name: Red Cabbage Slaw
instructions: Combine cabbage, carrot, mayonnaise, cranberries, walnuts, milk, cider vinegar, and sugar in a bowl; stir well. For best flavor results, cover and refrigerate until chilled.

red-chile-chicken.name: Red Chile Chicken

ingredients.prep: chopped (or 1 Tbsp. adobo sauce to keep things mild)
meat pulled from bones and shredded

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high until shimmering. Cook garlic and half of onion, stirring occasionally, until tender and beginning to brown, 6–8 minutes. Stir in achiote paste and cook, stirring occasionally, until brick red, about 1 minute. Add ancho chiles, chipotle chile, stock, cumin, and 2 tsp. salt and bring to a boil. Cover, remove from heat, and let sit until chiles are very soft, about 30 minutes.
Transfer chile mixture to a blender and purée until smooth. Return to saucepan, stir in chicken, and bring to a simmer over medium-low heat; season with salt.

red-or-green-mexican-chilaquiles-2-optio.name: Red Or Green Mexican Chilaquiles (2 Options For A Traditional Dish)
red-or-green-mexican-chilaquiles-2-optio.original_name: Chilaquiles mexicanos rojos o verdes (2 opciones para un plato tradicional)

ingredients.item: 400 g of maize tortillas, cut into triangles
2 Red chilies (can be tree for more hot)
200 g de queso rallado (tipo oaxaca o manchego)

instructions: Cut the tortillas into triangles: First, take the corn tortillas and cut them into triangles as if they were nachos. That will make it easier for them to cook evenly and impregnate well with the salsa later. Warm up oil: In a large frying pan, add a generous amount of olive oil (or oil you prefer) and heat up at medium-high heat. It's important that the oil's hot so that omelette gets cold and doesn't get drenched. Fry tortillas into tands: Add tortilla triangles into the frying pan but don't overargue the frying pan. It's best to do so in tanda to make sure they get cold evenly. Let them get cold till they're golden and crispy, which usually takes a few minutes from each other. Expand oil: Once tortilla triangles are golden and crispy, use a frying pan or tweezers to get them out of the frying pan and transfer them to a plate covered with absorbing paper. That will help to remove excess oil and will maintain crispy tortillas. Another option is to get your omelette chips ready. To do this, cut them into triangles, put them into an oven plate, scuba with olive oil and baker at 180 ° C till you see that the edges are slightly golden.

Select and prepare the ingredients: you will require mature red tomatoes, red chilies (such as tree or guajillo chili, depending on the level of spicy), a garlic and half onion tooth. Wash them good. Jumps the ingredients: Warm a frying pan or a paddle over medium heat with some olive oil. Skip tomatoes, chiles, garlic and onion till they are well golden and have a smoked smell. That usually takes a few minutes from each end. It's important that they don't get burned to avoid a bitter taste. Reg the ingredients: Once the ingredients are ready, get them with a hand or glass mixer and get a smooth blend. If the salsa remains very thick, you can add some water to suit consistency. Season the salsa: Test the salsa and get some salt as you please. Some people also add a touch of sugar to balance the acidity of tomatoes but this is optional.

Warm up oil in frying pan: Use a large frying pan and add some oil. Warm him up at medium heat. Fry the sauce: Once the oil's hot, pour the sauce you have prepared. Let it get cold for a few minutes, stirring from time to time. Add Fried Tortillas: Incorporate Fried Tortillas to frying pan with salsa. Use a large spatula or spoon to mix gently, ensuring that all tortillas are well covered with the salsa. It's important to do this with care so that tortillas don't get broken too bad. Cooking the set: Let tortillas be cooked in the sauce for a few minutes. That will allow tortillas to absorb some of the salsa and smooth slightly but without completely losing its crispy texture.

Add cheese and cream: Once tortillas are well impregnated with salsa, it's time to add grated cheese and sour cream. It evenly distribute both ingredients onto tortillas with salsa. Cheese may be the type you best like, but Oaxaca is the most traditional for its taste and texture. Mix and cook briefly: with a spatula, mix gently so that cheese and cream are integrated with tortillas and salsa. Let them cook with them for a few more minutes under low heat. That will allow the cheese to melt slightly and the cream to be mixed with the sauce, creating a creamy and delicious texture.

Fry the eggs: When you finish cooking the chilaquil mixture, fry the eggs in a separate frying pan. You can get them to taste: starry, Mexican, etc. Serve and decorate: To serve, place the chilaquils onto a plate and put the fried egg onto them. Can be with raw onion cuts, avocado... If you like, sprinkle some fresh cilantro pitted up to give a fresh and colorful touch.
red-or-green-mexican-chilaquiles-2-optio.category: Recetas de Aperitivos, Tapas y Pinchos

red-snapper-ceviche.name: Red Snapper Ceviche
instructions: Combine garlic, lemon juice, red pepper flakes, sugar, and 5 Tbsp. lime juice in a medium bowl. Add fish, season with salt, and toss gently to combine. Let sit, tossing occasionally to make sure all the slices of fish are getting equal love, until fish has firmed up slightly, 10–15 minutes. Add onion, tomatoes, and oil and toss to coat; let sit 5 minutes. Add avocado and cilantro and gently toss to combine. Taste and adjust seasoning with more salt and/or lime juice if desired.
Spoon ceviche into a large shallow bowl or divide into individual bowls and top with CornNuts. Drizzle with hot sauce and more lime juice. Serve with chips.

refrigerator-chocolate-cake-argiro.name: Refrigerator Chocolate Cake
instructions: Preheat the evening first to 160°C in the air.
Butter and flour the cake form 22 cm ring or butter and make non-stick paper in the cake form.
Finely chop the chocolate.
In a pot, add the milk, cream, finely chopped chocolate and in medium heat, mix the ingredients until they melt. Careful, not boil.
In a bowl, add the eggs, flour, sugar, vanilla and salt.
With stirring wire, mix them well and add them to the chocolate milk in the pot.
Mix the ingredients slightly, always in medium heat, until a thick layer is formed on the back of the spoon.
That's to draw a finger to the spoon, and keep the line open.
Pour the mixture into the cake form.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 1603
Allow it to cool and come to room temperature.
When he comes out of the ocean, he loses a little volume, like soufflés.
Refrigerate for one hour.
For the melted chocolate, take off carefully, and put it on a platter.
Always serve it frozen, with ice cream or whipped cream and fruit.

rhubarb-and-ginger-brioche-bread-pudding.name: Rhubarb And Ginger Brioche Bread Pudding

ingredients.prep: ends trimmed, stalks cut into  0.5 inch-wide pieces (8 to 9 cups)

ingredients.item: 1/2-inch-thick slices brioche or egg bread (each about 5x4 inches)

instructions: Whisk preserves and 1/2 cup water in heavy large skillet over medium heat until preserves dissolve. Sprinkle ginger and orange peel over. Scatter rhubarb evenly in skillet. Bring mixture to simmer over medium heat, occasionally stirring very gently, until rhubarb is slightly tender but still intact, about 10 minutes. Pour mixture into large sieve set over large saucepan. Let drain 15 minutes. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover fruit and syrup separately and chill.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Whisk sugar and eggs in medium bowl. Place milk and cream in heavy medium saucepan. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean. Bring to simmer over medium heat. Gradually add hot cream mixture to egg mixture, whisking custard to blend.

Butter 13x9x2-inch oval baking dish. Arrange enough bread slices in dish to cover bottom (some spaces will remain between slices). Spoon half of rhubarb evenly over. Repeat with bread and rhubarb. Pour custard over. Place baking dish in roasting pan. Add enough hot water to pan to come halfway up sides of dish.
Bake pudding until just set in center, about 50 minutes. Remove from oven. Let stand in water bath 30 minutes; remove. Boil reserved syrup until reduced to 1 cup, about 10 minutes. Keep warm.
Brush top of pudding with some rhubarb syrup. Spoon warm pudding into bowls; top with syrup and whipped cream.

rhubarb-cake.name: Rhubarb Cake

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: trimmed, thinly sliced on a diagonal (about 3 cups)

ingredients.item: Whipped cream or vanilla ice cream

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Place a piece of parchment paper on top of the base of springform pan. Place collar on top and close so it holds paper in place. Spray parchment and sides of pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray. Whisk 2 large eggs, room temperature, ⅔ cup buttermilk, room temperature, 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, and 1 Tbsp. vanilla extract in a medium bowl to combine.

Beat ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, 1⅔ cups (208 g) all-purpose flour, 1 cup plus 2 Tbsp. (225 g) granulated sugar, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton Kosher salt, 1½ tsp. baking powder, ¼ tsp. baking soda, and 1 tsp. finely grated lemon zest in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, starting on low speed and gradually increasing to medium speed, until combined and fine crumbs form, 1–2 minutes. With the motor running, gradually stream in egg mixture and beat until no pockets of dry flour remain, about 1 minute.

Scrape batter into prepared pan and smooth into an even layer. Arrange 2 large rhubarb stalks (about 8 oz.), trimmed, thinly sliced on a diagonal (about 3 cups), over batter in a single layer, slightly overlapping pieces. Sprinkle remaining 1 Tbsp. (13 g) granulated sugar on top. Bake cake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 45–55 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack.

Heat 3 Tbsp. strawberry jam, preferably seedless, in a small microwave-safe bowl in a microwave on high power just until liquefied and hot, 15–20 seconds. (Alternatively, heat in a small saucepan over medium.) If the jam is very seedy, pass through a fine-mesh sieve into another small bowl. Brush top of warm cake with jam, then sprinkle ¼ cup toasted sliced almonds around edges of top of cake if desired. Let cake cool in pan.
Unmold cake and serve slices top with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream.

rib-eye-steak-with-blue-cheese-butter-an.name: Rib-eye Steak With Blue Cheese Butter And Walla Walla Onion Rings

ingredients.item: (about 12 ounces) walla walla onion or other sweet onion (such as vidalia or maui)
ingredients.prep: cut into 1/3-inch-thick rounds, separated into rings

instructions: Sprinkle steaks on both sides with coarse salt and freshly ground black pepper. Place on plate; cover and chill overnight.
Using fork, mix all ingredients in small bowl. Season with freshly ground black pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill. Let stand at room temperature 1 hour before using.
Prepare barbecue (medium-high heat). Grill steaks to desired doneness, 4 to 5 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer steaks to cutting board; let rest 5 minutes.

Meanwhile, whisk flour, coarse salt, and baking powder in medium bowl. Add beer and vodka; whisk just until blended. Pour enough oil into heavy large pot to reach depth of 2 inches. Attach deep-fry thermometer to side of pot; heat oil over medium heat to 177°C. Working with 2 onion rings at a time, dip onion rings into batter; shake off excess. Gently drop onion rings into hot oil; fry until deep golden, adjusting heat to maintain temperature, 2 to 4 minutes. Transfer onion rings to paper towels. Repeat with remaining batter and onion rings.
Cut steaks in half across grain. Place 1 steak half on each of 4 plates. Top with blue cheese butter and onion rings.

rice-cooker-super-cheesy-polenta.name: Rice Cooker Super Cheesy Polenta
instructions: Place butter, onion, and garlic in rice cooker; close lid and turn on cooker. Cook until onion is soft and translucent, stirring occasionally, 10 to 15 minutes. Add chicken broth, milk, polenta, and salt. Cover and cook on full cycle, stirring occasionally, until polenta has absorbed the liquid, about 20 minutes. Add Cheddar cheese, Parmesan cheese, and black pepper; stir until cheese is melted.

roasted-beets-and-carrots-with-honey-bal.name: Roasted Beets And Carrots With Honey-balsamic Glaze

ingredients.prep: or more to taste, cut into 1-inch chunks

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Wrap beets in aluminum foil; place in a baking dish. Toss carrots with oil; arrange in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.

Roast beets in the preheated oven for 1 ½ hours, adding carrots during the last 30 minutes. Remove beets; set aside to cool. Check carrots to see if they are tender; roast up to 20 minutes more if necessary.
Peel and chop beets into 1-inch pieces.
Combine balsamic vinegar and honey in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add beets and carrots; simmer until sauce is thickened and vegetables are glazed, 5 to 10 minutes. Serve.

roasted-butternut-squash-with-spicy-onio.name: Roasted Butternut Squash With Spicy Onions

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook onion, stirring often, until lightly charred and softened but not falling apart, 5–7 minutes. Add red pepper flakes and toss to combine. Remove pan from heat and mix in lime juice and honey. Let cool, then mix in lime zest.
DO AHEAD: Spicy onions can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Preheat oven to 350°. Toast hazelnuts on a small rimmed baking sheet, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool; coarsely chop.

Increase oven temperature to 400°. Toss squash and ¼ cup oil in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Divide between 2 rimmed baking sheets; reserve bowl. Roast, undisturbed, until tender, 15–20 minutes.
Return squash to bowl; add hazelnuts, parsley, mint, marjoram, and spicy onions, and toss to combine.
Transfer squash mixture to a large serving platter, crumble goat cheese over, and drizzle with remaining 2 Tbsp. oil.

roasted-eggplant-salad-recipe-lezzet.name: Roasted Eggplant Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon of lemon juice or delicate sour
You can get a colorful look using yellow or orange dolmali pepper instead.
Instead of onion you can add different flavors by adding fresh onions or barley onions.
You can add some mustard or capari to the taste profile you can give variousity.
You can use a small amount of sesame oil or avocado oil instead of olive oil.
You can get a different acidic aroma by adding delicate sour, apple vinegar or white vinegar instead of lemon juice.
You can taste salt and pepper as well as pepper, thyme or Kimyon.
A mildly painful version can use red flakes or isot.
You can add both color and flavor by adding boiled corn, black or green olive.
K&uuml can increase protein rate by adding chopped white cheese or lor cheese.

roasted-fennel.name: Roasted Fennel
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Trim stalks off the fennel, setting green fronds to the side to later use for garnish, if desired. Trim root ends to create a flat surface; there is no need to remove the core. Slice fennel into 1/4- to 1/3-inch slices and place on the baking sheet.
Whisk olive oil, vinegar, garlic, thyme, salt, and pepper together in a small bowl; brush mixture over fennel slices.
Roast in the preheated oven until fennel is soft and caramelized, 25 to 30 minutes, turning slices over halfway through. Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with green fronds, if desired.

roasted-pepper-caprese.name: Roasted Pepper Caprese

ingredients.item: . mixed bell peppers and chiles (any more than 2 hot chiles and the peppers will end up spicy
ingredients.prep: which is delicious as long as that is what you are going for; a handful of shishitos are great in the mix as well), large peppers seeded, cut off of cores into quarters

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Toss peppers, chiles, garlic, and oil in a Dutch oven or heavy roasting pan; season with salt and pepper and toss again to coat. Cover and roast, tossing occasionally, until peppers are very tender, 2–2½ hours. Let cool.

Arrange half of peppers on a platter. Top peppers with mozzarella and basil. Measure out 3 Tbsp. of the oily juices left behind and transfer to a small bowl (save remaining peppers and their juices for another use; we love them tossed with pasta, layered into sandwiches, or stirred into frittatas). Add vinegar; season with salt. Stir to combine, then drizzle dressing over salad.
Do Ahead: Peppers can be roasted 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

roasted-red-onions-with-pomegranate-oran.name: Roasted Red Onions With Pomegranate, Orange, And Parsley Gremolata

ingredients.prep: peeled, each cut into 8 wedges through core, with some core still attached to each piece

instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 218°C. Line large rimmed baking sheet with foil. Whisk first 6 ingredients in large bowl. Add onions; toss gently. Arrange onions close together, 1 cut side down, on baking sheet; spoon juices from bowl over. Roast 30 minutes. Using small spatula, carefully turn onions over. Continue to roast onions until tender and thickly coated with glaze, watching to prevent overbrowning, 25 to 28 minutes longer. Remove from oven. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 hours ahead. Let stand on baking sheet at room temperature. Rewarm in 177°C oven before serving, if desired.
Mix pomegranate seeds, parsley, and orange peel in small bowl.
Arrange warm or room-temperature onions on platter. Sprinkle gremolata over and serve.

roasted-sweet-potato-dinner-with-mushroo.name: Roasted Sweet Potato Dinner With Mushrooms, Lentils, And Feta-tahini Sauce | Epicurious
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Toss potatoes, 1 Tbsp. oil, 1/2 tsp. salt, and 1/2 tsp. pepper on a rimmed baking sheet. Arrange potatoes cut side down in an even layer and roast until beginning to soften and golden brown on the cut sides, 15–20 minutes.
While potatoes roast, cook lentils in a medium pot of simmering salted water until lentils are tender but still retain their shape, 15–20 minutes. Drain and transfer to a medium bowl.

Toss mushrooms, 1 Tbsp. oil, and 1/2 tsp. pepper in another medium bowl. Arrange around potatoes on hot baking sheet and continue to roast until mushrooms are browned and crisped and potatoes are well browned on cut sides, 12–15 minutes.

Meanwhile, pulse feta, tahini, garlic, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, half of the dill, 3 Tbsp. oil, and 1/4 cup water in a food processor until a smooth sauce forms. Add more water, 1 Tbsp. at a time, and pulse to combine until sauce is just thin enough to pour.
Add scallions and remaining dill, 2 Tbsp. oil, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, 1/2 tsp. salt, and 1/4 tsp. pepper to bowl with lentils and stir to combine. Stir in roasted mushrooms.
Divide feta sauce among plates. Top with potato halves. Spoon lentil salad over and drizzle with oil.

roasted-sweet-potato-black-bean-and-chor.name: Roasted Sweet Potato, Black Bean, And Chorizo Breakfast Bowls
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Make potatoes: Combine sweet potatoes, olive oil, cumin, and salt in a medium bowl. Spread evenly on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven, stirring after 10 minutes, until browned and cooked, 18 to 20 minutes total.
Meanwhile, make beans: Combine black beans, cumin, salt, and garlic powder in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. Heat until warmed through, 8 to 10 minutes. Keep warm.

Meanwhile, make chorizo: Cook chorizo in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking up any large clumps, until browned, 5 to 6 minutes. Transfer chorizo to a paper towel-lined plate using a slotted spoon. Reserve about 1 tablespoon grease in the skillet, adding butter as needed to make up the difference.
Cook eggs: Crack eggs into grease-butter mixture in the skillet and cook until whites are set and yolks reach desired doneness, 3 to 5 minutes.
Divide sweet potatoes, drained black beans, chorizo, and avocados between 4 bowls. Top each bowl with an egg.

roasted-tomatoes-and-burrata-caprese-sal.name: Roasted Tomatoes And Burrata Caprese Salad

ingredients.item: Burrata cheese balls or small fresh mozzarella balls such as ciliegine

instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Preheat oven or toaster oven to 204°C.'}
{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'On a small sheet pan lined with Reynolds Wrap Aluminum Foil, toss the tomatoes and garlic with 10ml of the olive oil.'}
{'step': '3', 'instruction': 'Add salt and pepper and toss to coat. Roast in oven for 15 minutes.'}
{'step': '4', 'instruction': 'Transfer the warm tomatoes to a serving platter.'}
{'step': '5', 'instruction': 'Drain the water from the burrata cheese or mozzarella balls. Add cheese to the warm tomatoes.'}
{'step': '6', 'instruction': 'Drizzle with the olive oil and balsamic vinegar then season with the kosher salt and freshly ground pepper. Toss gently to coat if desired.'}
{'step': '7', 'instruction': 'Gently tear the basil leaves into smaller pieces and scatter over the salad and serve.'}

roasted-tomatocashew-salsa.name: Roasted Tomato–cashew Salsa

ingredients.item: Dried cascabel chiles or 3 pasilla chiles

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Arrange cashews on one side of a rimmed baking sheet and chiles on the other. Toast until chiles are fragrant, about 5 minutes. Remove chiles from baking sheet, then continue roasting nuts, tossing once, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool. Remove and discard stems from chiles.

Increase oven temperature to 450°. Roast tomatoes on a clean rimmed baking sheet until skin is browned and beginning to separate from flesh, 30–35 minutes. Transfer to a blender and add garlic, lime juice, and salt; blend until smooth. Add chiles and blend until coarsely chopped. Add cashews and pulse until coarsely chopped, about 5 pulses.
Do Ahead: Salsa can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before serving.

rosemary-pudding-teleculinaria.name: Rosemary Pudding
instructions: Lay the contents of the pudding sachets in a bowl and mix with some milk, dissolving well. Reserve.

Place the remaining milk in a pot, add the previous preparation and stir until dissolved. Add the rosemary branch, take the medium heat and always stir until it becomes consistent, without letting it boil.
Remove the rosemary branch and distribute the pudding to bowls. Let it cool and cool for at least 2 hours. Serve decorated with rosemary sticks.

rosy-boa-cocktail.name: Rosy Boa Cocktail
instructions: Combine salt, paprika, and chile powder in a small bowl. Moisten half of each rim of 8 rocks glasses and dip into chile salt. Set glasses aside.

Combine grapefruit juice, tequila, pomegranate juice, lime juice, and rose water in a large pitcher or 8-cup measuring glass. Add 1 cup ice and stir until ice is melted and cocktail is very cold. Stir in ginger beer. Fill prepared glasses with ice and divide cocktail among glasses. Garnish with grapefruit wedges and top off with more ginger beer, if desired.
Do Ahead: Grapefruit mixture can be made 8 hours ahead. Stir in ice, then cover and chill. Add ginger beer and prepare glasses just before serving.

rustic-bruschetta-argiro.name: Rustic Bruschetta

ingredients.item: 1⁄2 baguette cut diagonally into thin slices
1⁄2 baguette cut diagonally into thin slices

instructions: In a bowl, add the olive oil, salt and oregano.
Cut the garlic along and rub with the cut side the slices of the baguette.
Then use a brush and rub them with the flavored olive oil.
Add the slices to a baking pan and bake for 10-15 minutes at 200 degrees Celsius until golden.
Remove the seeds from the tomatoes and finely chop them in bowls.
Cut the cucumber along, remove the seeds, cut into small frames and add to the bowl.
Add the feta cheese, olives and vinegar.
Mix (if we want salt) and add a spoonful to each toasted slice.
